name: AOC Organizing Team
subject: Pass the PRO Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
“Unions built the middle class.”
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210309-1936-header&t=1&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)
Throughout Joe Biden’s campaign, we heard the statement, “unions built the middle class.” And it’s true.
We now have the opportunity to protect unions and expand labor rights by passing the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act_ – known as the PRO Act. The PRO Act would strengthen protections for workers who want to form a union among other protections.
The PRO Act is likely to pass the House, but Republicans in the Senate are fighting back — spreading lies on how empowered unions are bad for business. They are, if you’re taking advantage of your workers.
The pandemic has demonstrated the urgent need to protect and strengthen workers’ rights. That’s why Alexandria co-sponsored the PRO Act, and why we’re joining the Democratic Socialists of America to do everything we can right now to pass the bill — that means reaching voters in states where crucial Senators have yet to sign onto the PRO Act.
[Will you sign up for a phone bank shift and make calls next weekend to voters in these states to help pass the PRO Act and protect the rights of workers to organize for their rights?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8137?source=em1936-aoc&t=2&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)
Upcoming shifts:
---
[Pass the PRO Act Phone Banks](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8137?source=em1936-aoc&t=3&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)Sunday, March 21st
12:00 - 3:00PM ET / 9:00AM - 12:00PM PT**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8137?source=em1936-aoc&t=4&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)** Sunday, March 21st
_BILINGUAL shift_
3:00 - 6:00PM ET / 12:00 - 3:00PM PT**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8137?source=em1936-aoc&t=5&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)** Monday, March 22nd
5:00 - 8:00PM ET / 2:00 - 5:00PM PT**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8137?source=em1936-aoc&t=6&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)** [See all other shifts.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8137?source=em1936-aoc&t=7&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)
The rights of workers have been under attack for decades, and the share of workers who are part of a union has been on the decline since the 1980s. The PRO Act would empower employees to stand together and organize for better working conditions.
And, the bill would help essential workers secure better wages, paid leave, and hazard pay as the pandemic rages on.
[Join us and the DSA to make calls and reach voters to help protect workers’ rights and pass the PRO Act now.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8137?source=em1936-aoc&t=8&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210309-1936-footer&t=9&refcode2=1936_2526796_pXTE-_&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=10&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=11&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=12&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=13&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1936%2E2526796%2EpXTE-_). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: Stop Pelosi's steal
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends, Tomorrow, a Democrat-controlled House Committee will look at overturning our state certified election, a partisan attempt to steal our election from Iowa’s voters. Our message is simple: Iowa’s elections should be decided by votes cast in Iowa, NOT by Washington politicians.
---
| [Fight for Iowa Voters](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=223c75b9c1&e=16fac31a0f "Fight for Iowa Voters")
---
| | | This entire process has been a sham from the start. Instead of challenging the election results in Iowa’s courts, Rita Hart chose to turn to Nancy Pelosi and the rest of the radical Democrats in DC. She clearly knows this case has no merit but is still trying to overturn the will of the voters in Iowa’s Second District. [Can you chip in today to help us stop Nancy Pelosi from stealing this election?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=f97100de0b&e=16fac31a0f) It’s clear the Democrats want your election to be decided in Washington and not in Iowa, but we’re not going to let them get away with it. I’m doing everything I can to stand up to this power grab, and I need you on my team to help fight back. We will not let Rita Hart overturn the will of Iowa voters, and we are definitely not going to let Nancy Pelosi undermine the integrity of Iowa elections. [Will you help by chipping in $25, $100 or even $50 today?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=210a973eff&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks
---

| | | Dear Friend,
In just 60 days, Virginia Republicans will face one of their most important decisions in a generation: who will face off with the far-left radicals that Virginia Democrats nominate to replace King Ralph and Justin Fairfax.

As a Marine and the first Republican since 1865 to represent a majority-black district in the House of Delegates, I know what it takes to get the job done and I will not be outworked as your Republican nominee for Lieutenant Governor. In order to win in November, however,**I need YOUR help in securing our Party’s nomination at the convention which is only two months away.**

Can I count on you to contribute $60 for 60 days until convention?
---
| [YES, I’ll contribute $60, Winsome!](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=bcf011a5cd&e=a4aff4086b)

[Chip in $75](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=d0122c9017&e=a4aff4086b)

[Chip in $150](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=0cef05a762&e=a4aff4086b)

[Chip in $250](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=e89bf5ce77&e=a4aff4086b)
Democrats in Richmond are just getting started imposing their dangerous, far-left policies on the Commonwealth, and we need Virginia Republicans that aren’t afraid to take them to task.

I cannot and will not stand by any longer as they continue releasing murderers onto our streets, imposing mandates on our people and businesses, and inch Virginia closer to the likes of New York and California than the Commonwealth we all call home.

We will not surrender Virginia, surrender is not a Marine word, and surrender is not a conservative word!

Semper Fi Winsome Sears
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

I'll fighting to stop both of these bills in Congress right now. And I'm asking you to help me by calling your Congressman today and urging them to OPPOSE both HR 8 and HR 1446! CALL YOUR ELECTED OFFICIALS - URGE THEM TO OPPOSE! 202-224-3121 -- Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) Paid for by Greene for Congress This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. In 2020, Republicans pulled off what so many people thought was impossible: we gained over a dozen seats in the House -- and now we are only 5 away from taking back the House majority. _Friend, one story in that incredible performance was Michelle Steel 's._

Michelle Steel is a proud conservative and proven leader who is standing up to the Radical Left's tax hikes and job killing policies. **Even though she was outspent 3 to 1, she was able to FLIP her district from blue to red, and is now fighting for you in Congress.**

But to make sure she is able to keep advocating on behalf of California taxpayers and small businesses, she needs your help. [**Can she count on your help to keep the momentum from 2020 going and to hold back the Democrats ' dark money?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016WirLMd7CFeOyGT4oxnCpa8quLqbQUbET2E--BuXH2ljV7Zf93wlxQeEeaKtyLa85r9bhjdwCHq7uDAK5Hv4L12hWTsMl_iq7ZaQ0CORuZIMVQyT_uIOEN0OvtGdyMAyyABB39x10zI_9Ig309bSa5BnmD3iSDTinSXEIF0w5MeF78rHlL10UF8hJDpUuqrSihfyITQ8Ofogx-7LH2hlSYNkexPzF7bJ7gUAofyIIDhZ93SbJXwlw3qW9qFgh9LCYu7gizLkqaqAt-kvo9w5oOvYTi3SAIrtD2I9xS72JyBNhmC9ZIsEZ1V9x8AftkaWMTJK7-3NeTOKWVTje1v8f9VAscL7Vy5H0p_1PHh8HVeWrmUhKT0O4WUbZPFenzSXs-RrstM3wsa_u2aTCtR6ZgHEx30tgEAPKesWWRpbwnTsgPze6a-l5g==&c=JmgUDukANNMsOAYqYoDY8x-wKWwD2acQ7_h5cfl1Fiidjjs1YK4z8w==&ch=qiI4dt06QXQXQXqMELvCEQK3VIsCW5is7dB6QN4lEOto4L2FwO_vYw==)

name: Ron Johnson
subject: This put me at the TOP of the Democrats’ list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Friend,

This weekend, the Senate Democrats passed their massive spending blowout without a single Republican vote. They wanted to jam this bill through and pass it in the dead of night before anyone had time to read it. And that's because it isn't a COVID relief bill. It adds $1.9 trillion to our national debt and spends that borrowed money on a long liberal wish list. It's the first step Chuck Schumer is taking putting America on the path of full blown Socialism.

To slow Schumer's fast track process down, I objected and forced the Senate clerks to read the entire bill out loud -- yes, all 628 pages of it -- and Schumer cried foul. How dare I insist that Senators and the public actually have time to READ the bill before he jams it through.

Well, add Schumer's dissatisfaction with me forcing the bill's reading to my investigations of Hunter Biden and other liberal wrongdoing and it's pretty easy to see why I'm at the TOP of the Democrats' target list. [**I need your immediate help to fight back.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RdOChi1IU_V_QqvwWWLxEmdYyQVRQhElPJXpvIPZE8c4aKBvaBk2ExBsX9pOjmZpWiyBDxb1D1LkSePAu5bE-X0PF_k0AF2-kdFVOLCri3YOkt_YczIoOkNmd9k4L4IS8AA1sqHs4Gl7IQxpkQBgxByIbewGGdj_yy-QF9Vtr6vFTgKG56gT0CcVpEUB0rKeG2fB2tdjcc9Cdz3RnC0jYcM_3mPfTfh7pER65j1-SVDZ6dWOxBIB-Uav9HrSnA6ZmhdscJDFQ7Kcs6DmKlqC-cmy-1RynPbNY0Hz8Np_t4awUrp8MKcVmlcY-OQSNJm63q_dUuWQZ9nRjGAYQdv2f7L-BpCgIO1BL6kGARw1LnVwbQTbi8CJgiB0xXLwLU42MLYU1y9cMK9bFnj7v42MBb4qELQXDrD7&c=CM1TKZlAQtIIEuPYsbBaKqhmLtepwh83L7VCcNBVv681YwNTZ0K6Qw==&ch=2CBmCCX7PsBabKbs7ihYezImzQArRatGuL_uXBd3HXmbKVOLEzfYNA==) I will never stand for this sort of DC nonsense -- the American people deserve better. I will always fight for our conservative values, but I can't do that unless I have your support.

Thank you,

Ron Johnson

name: Defeat Hassan
subject: Would you vote to give Cop-Killer Michael Addison $1400?
body:
Flip the Senate & Restore the Republican Majority

Derek, Senator Hassan’s vote to give convicted felons like cop-killer Michael Addison $1400 checks proves once again that Granite Staters are **_last_** on her priority list. Last week Sen. Hassan voted to use **your tax dollars** to bail out blue state governors like Gavin Newsom and Andrew Cuomo, and now she wants to make sure that your money goes to _**convicted killers**_ as well! name: Tate Reeves
subject: Neanderthal thinking? Let me get this straight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
Last week, Joe Biden said the decision to lift COVID-19 restrictions is "neanderthal thinking." You read that right. [](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=e4a6da6fb07e438f8dc8316e3dff8160&_e=dWL41SEGKsOWY9NelcuRhqhHpoJdQFqWHjCWCcQwJuX1wyRSqoeq4FPHK4S7BF-1TKPEJQTR6hzf2ZmJbrd0TXvCMKn5sOeWYg6DA6EAYwrVAQvqHZasXm3ZdeWJghqTqbeU82Y6u0D9mwFxtSEc1RZUQMFCoEzogsnA84xkz-04uWqrB9yzmXsR81QdEbr4mtQbAssHuUVJFOtazFPRTz4wGOYJoFHq39SdOvvinxRw4nMdiSrtB_8tCtnRZ-XMbDWvEQshU7X2TXdoUWsiQ9CoZK2vy3-wgmok07ahjKf_vYLKj5WeCaWH0pwNaC1d70UKEejYVRL_CQ-7glTYfl6LLtAppG5NLzzp9P36RIA%3D) | |

Last week, Joe Biden said the decision to lift COVID-19 restrictions is “neanderthal thinking.”

You read that right.

**Joe Biden called me and all Mississippians who want to re-open our beloved state “neanderthals.”**

Make no mistake: He is attacking and name-calling us for wanting to re-open our state as a last resort.

Joe Biden has a plan to force girls to compete with biological males in sports, while he doesn’t have a plan to reopen America! Talk about “neanderthal thinking.”

He thinks Dr. Seuss is one of the largest threats to America.

**Perhaps worst of all, he is considering granting 11 million illegal immigrants amnesty, while 11 million Americans are out of work!**

**President Biden should check himself before he name-calls Mississippians.**

_It’s time for us to come together and hold Biden and his liberal politicians accountable._
[**Fight for Mississippi! \- Donate _HERE_**](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=e4a6da6fb07e438f8dc8316e3dff8160&_e=dWL41SEGKsOWY9NelcuRhiVx9hd1PA7L65tzfaw1Usoqy0zFhwXoYQkRS9VlInsdcRriY2zOkQuYJXvmi1cO8ruFVY_kZ7bXK7BfBn783U3tW1KH047ZNRcOInnj20C2uQ63pI2CktRCuIjqFKp-UcIrrSkkgHwxtCM82EvziALCSZKaGGqYiS-3Oq9JVC9CuYiRqax9DWEmHFE1Vq60sFaTCGJSzdInr5KeSbjEznAZg4BJ92xaPktl_htbFf59cMo1uf88ROl3JVXUyzAp5bq7g1cslKtVUbr8EAt0XJETgpjbJ_ZQrRHgxdE634tiDVW_Z9nXvxU0fFF1x96zMDqTnZdWjm-LOJD-gTGCS-Dk9qQfwI_8RW3YzEDX-mQE95qmTXC_teQMBrppnMdIqRTE517hIopNJ3c6x3iDlHw%3D)
Joe Biden and his liberal administration are continuously talking about expanding the size and role of government in our daily lives.

Well, have we got news for them: _**Mississippians don’t need handlers!**_

Join me and my team today to ensure that Big Government Joe doesn’t expand the role of government into your life any further. **Let’s keep socialism _OUT_ of Mississippi.**
[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=e4a6da6fb07e438f8dc8316e3dff8160&_e=dWL41SEGKsOWY9NelcuRhiVx9hd1PA7L65tzfaw1Usoqy0zFhwXoYQkRS9VlInsdcRriY2zOkQuYJXvmi1cO8ruFVY_kZ7bXK7BfBn783U3tW1KH047ZNRcOInnj20C2uQ63pI2CktRCuIjqFKp-UcIrrSkkgHwxtCM82EvziALCSZKaGGqYiS-3Oq9JVC9CuYiRqax9DWEmHFE1Vq60sGcr38eckbUsNE8GDpoqM2wKV1yhCg13t1mHDG5TFlU817GzzCwvIR4SFX9THhhBPN-ck38W-Ix6sWaaEiRzNA5cbPFR8D52Y18aWaaayQfKXK49lTejLQ3pO5cmA3VwMe141Tr1eueP9OZ4d3ZyAjIKrvctpijg_Ilne4sErrZ6kvYaueSbsMSWRa5kQS_wtYm0oaN07BdNZDhDy9UKsZg%3D)

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nPGrB_KiujlWYUmt5E6sDUC_VEddrKn-v9bfgBk1lrCSJvc8vtR3e89DCipNlIK9xxbMwabssW2x1N8Uje2TAwvtaodkaCVHfYMOU6ea03ARL5DeNCcfWFg26OpnHFykEiCRqDNxKZaJHtKov5jDwbWsHTGSKTTpOciqzWv7zXJwauvjFc3IFrZdAo6p3CgTxNCykaI5XIuBh7NPOYTI9rmEiMyKy2Wfz2vPHdWMBvaq0AYft7f-cp0Wtz4AdyKF44hqSYyBDZZ2eEdZGqpTWa6ikJYMJJCqwSQfOwX5Ou6PzUQYDjRmAt6bPKzAxXBqw9UKrUgXnepEuJLXNj4GjOefm0LygZzLgQb7_WaWP2SnazzK1stWdRGGQKieOokl2VveVnduZuuo8QvxRObhMf7VKQyO4nN9fXUpZt8ABzxqaUOkNyxdew==&c=cdXVEGom7qQs42l548nJ8_uHX59Z3I6DdxCG4KsqwTso6k6kp9AVkQ==&ch=h_EHeOv81py58fQ9gcnisZSHyqkC7TvzfaXzySiV5tTnvxbcyEbN1Q==)

Friend,

Democrats could not make their radical climate agenda any more clear _**\-- and they will stop at nothing to force it through Congress.**_

With the stroke of a pen, Joe Biden killed thousands of American energy jobs and shut down the Keystone XL Pipeline.

Protecting the American worker and pushing for American energy independence has always been a top priority of mine. [**That is why I am calling on you, Friend, to sign my petition to continue the Keystone XL Pipeline.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nPGrB_KiujlWYUmt5E6sDUC_VEddrKn-v9bfgBk1lrCSJvc8vtR3e89DCipNlIK9xxbMwabssW2x1N8Uje2TAwvtaodkaCVHfYMOU6ea03ARL5DeNCcfWFg26OpnHFykEiCRqDNxKZaJHtKov5jDwbWsHTGSKTTpOciqzWv7zXJwauvjFc3IFrZdAo6p3CgTxNCykaI5XIuBh7NPOYTI9rmEiMyKy2Wfz2vPHdWMBvaq0AYft7f-cp0Wtz4AdyKF44hqSYyBDZZ2eEdZGqpTWa6ikJYMJJCqwSQfOwX5Ou6PzUQYDjRmAt6bPKzAxXBqw9UKrUgXnepEuJLXNj4GjOefm0LygZzLgQb7_WaWP2SnazzK1stWdRGGQKieOokl2VveVnduZuuo8QvxRObhMf7VKQyO4nN9fXUpZt8ABzxqaUOkNyxdew==&c=cdXVEGom7qQs42l548nJ8_uHX59Z3I6DdxCG4KsqwTso6k6kp9AVkQ==&ch=h_EHeOv81py58fQ9gcnisZSHyqkC7TvzfaXzySiV5tTnvxbcyEbN1Q==)

[CONTINUE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nPGrB_KiujlWYUmt5E6sDUC_VEddrKn-v9bfgBk1lrCSJvc8vtR3e89DCipNlIK9xxbMwabssW2x1N8Uje2TAwvtaodkaCVHfYMOU6ea03ARL5DeNCcfWFg26OpnHFykEiCRqDNxKZaJHtKov5jDwbWsHTGSKTTpOciqzWv7zXJwauvjFc3IFrZdAo6p3CgTxNCykaI5XIuBh7NPOYTI9rmEiMyKy2Wfz2vPHdWMBvaq0AYft7f-cp0Wtz4AdyKF44hqSYyBDZZ2eEdZGqpTWa6ikJYMJJCqwSQfOwX5Ou6PzUQYDjRmAt6bPKzAxXBqw9UKrUgXnepEuJLXNj4GjOefm0LygZzLgQb7_WaWP2SnazzK1stWdRGGQKieOokl2VveVnduZuuo8QvxRObhMf7VKQyO4nN9fXUpZt8ABzxqaUOkNyxdew==&c=cdXVEGom7qQs42l548nJ8_uHX59Z3I6DdxCG4KsqwTso6k6kp9AVkQ==&ch=h_EHeOv81py58fQ9gcnisZSHyqkC7TvzfaXzySiV5tTnvxbcyEbN1Q==)
---

President Biden undid years of progress towards American energy independence while destroying thousands of families' livelihoods across the country.

_**Democrats are more focused on their radical climate agenda than the thousands of Americans it will impact.**_

Friend,

Joe Biden has been in power for over a month, and he's done nothing but further his own radical agenda.
**[HELP US STOP HIM](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qblNXG_jSFAra7iQo-sYjmKg3Y4UCUPgyeOIxyZOY-hEqMK3ZCzni_X9Fp8oJGXJ2vTGtyzdH9YulbxiQkpagCWz6u6qbrHukN4vVz2OuohXMbc3A_rT0YJGEcQPzdzBlaht3FoPZJ8xE8b2Jkq-Ln87goAC6odMnXKc_TW7LZmKjpSAJQGGtpCZ0h7S7sZjTRF7Qf5ZmlfoOugqY41uaDQKFU4nai6xZYriLDpCP4mCRkQZ7Wl0pSfjo-J9DBLhJ_Xg6tL-l6t-gNHvRn8Z5lxSfsUfSpN4lrUjF8osCVsbjuHZXAHWKYKo_dWHJArVtMKDWoVqlgJT7qk_tBC824FPA7N3a9cz6xKXmB6ZxhHpl0aJgqI6TDtO52-qwp2pTgqQyE9lnDKnxCI9x3iW0L_BZDj6FxGLB2PpPQ2hCACT3zQjOF10NUYmMNsvE4zz8STFji9WoXo=&c=QYJqaWtmZqQWL590mwyBG7pkVbrsZzk-CG3dy-YNtnbN_AbmRHLfAg==&ch=yAZPnftxgz3C3U6nLYsga-FSPG59-Um-Ijon--AnqCZ93ScG5iLOrg==)**
Instead of focusing on what's best for our country, like safely getting our children back to school and restarting the economy, Biden is pushing for dangerous policies that will HURT our nation. body:
We must defend FREE SPEECH and fight back against Cancel Culture that is threatening to RUIN the country that we love.

OMG, Friend, did you see this? I mean just LOOK at this headline:

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wsHH6fAlRLo3_t0pp4dhIaxkyAFu6d3gfPx1Men-_s6DlDFNELR9voXHQYIamh7yoKvROqE0Jla_I_cUyt53NXABetp7jxeL1UctlXYoC3Hfwy2o0AkuLsSfkzsJf_aKGYhUnHUlzbuogT7dmJ_lpFvyG8F_n1WMEmDocNJb6U8-EvprYDyJF-IrLTW6AyCVINRpLUrNQxt6hOt_MBCzOZ4rKNaLJWzGaKPMvEZxgt-HXeQaM-bIloB4BajP73JJoO-FyNYF8TVJTUOzzwzDxKvWofAIvF7kimQqgFyLWq29PL6q6hqMGn_Yxec8VJIttUq3k54PXi1YjZe7XENXEV4l_G-oAYmEoRktsojsZRFYJSZjZASCnMcFoIQ8h0f5BYgwl7kptxOw5OUdhiA-6A==&c=WU0uVDo268MyaJkl0AjrTGJpCwVtnTA57JuFVtcJsxVfJ2-7bcRReg==&ch=8Tcs_S1z911u-I413w1sm-vaZd0OFgoh0y8onqgNlzWMuZPlsJw2rw==)

_Can 't see it?_ _**That 's because the Democrats and Big Tech are doing everything in their power to destroy free speech AND cancel opinions that don't fit their liberal agenda.**_

[**STOP BIG TECH CENSORSHIP**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wsHH6fAlRLo3_t0pp4dhIaxkyAFu6d3gfPx1Men-_s6DlDFNELR9voXHQYIamh7yoKvROqE0Jla_I_cUyt53NXABetp7jxeL1UctlXYoC3Hfwy2o0AkuLsSfkzsJf_aKGYhUnHUlzbuogT7dmJ_lpFvyG8F_n1WMEmDocNJb6U8-EvprYDyJF-IrLTW6AyCVINRpLUrNQxt6hOt_MBCzOZ4rKNaLJWzGaKPMvEZxgt-HXeQaM-bIloB4BajP73JJoO-FyNYF8TVJTUOzzwzDxKvWofAIvF7kimQqgFyLWq29PL6q6hqMGn_Yxec8VJIttUq3k54PXi1YjZe7XENXEV4l_G-oAYmEoRktsojsZRFYJSZjZASCnMcFoIQ8h0f5BYgwl7kptxOw5OUdhiA-6A==&c=WU0uVDo268MyaJkl0AjrTGJpCwVtnTA57JuFVtcJsxVfJ2-7bcRReg==&ch=8Tcs_S1z911u-I413w1sm-vaZd0OFgoh0y8onqgNlzWMuZPlsJw2rw==)

We must defend FREE SPEECH and fight back against Cancel Culture that is threatening to RUIN the country that we love. Without your help, the Far Left will soon block, ban, and blur opinions simply because they don't fit their socialist narrative.

They've already canceled our beloved children's author, Dr. Seuss -- what's next, Little Bo Peep?

We can't let our children and grandchildren grow up in an America where the government has FULL control over what they learn in schools, what they read at home, and what they're allowed to think or say. The government control has to END.

That's where we come in. [**Will you step up today and DEFEND the future of our country by helping House Conservatives put a STOP to Big Tech?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wsHH6fAlRLo3_t0pp4dhIaxkyAFu6d3gfPx1Men-_s6DlDFNELR9voXHQYIamh7yoKvROqE0Jla_I_cUyt53NXABetp7jxeL1UctlXYoC3Hfwy2o0AkuLsSfkzsJf_aKGYhUnHUlzbuogT7dmJ_lpFvyG8F_n1WMEmDocNJb6U8-EvprYDyJF-IrLTW6AyCVINRpLUrNQxt6hOt_MBCzOZ4rKNaLJWzGaKPMvEZxgt-HXeQaM-bIloB4BajP73JJoO-FyNYF8TVJTUOzzwzDxKvWofAIvF7kimQqgFyLWq29PL6q6hqMGn_Yxec8VJIttUq3k54PXi1YjZe7XENXEV4l_G-oAYmEoRktsojsZRFYJSZjZASCnMcFoIQ8h0f5BYgwl7kptxOw5OUdhiA-6A==&c=WU0uVDo268MyaJkl0AjrTGJpCwVtnTA57JuFVtcJsxVfJ2-7bcRReg==&ch=8Tcs_S1z911u-I413w1sm-vaZd0OFgoh0y8onqgNlzWMuZPlsJw2rw==)

name: Pete Snyder
subject: Here’s how to send a message to Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It starts by TAKING BACK Virginia &zwnj

Friend,

We know conservatives across the country are already _TIRED_ of the lies, half-truths, and spin coming from Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Ralph Northam and Terry McAuliffe.

_Democrats are getting rid of millions of good-paying jobs, keeping our kids out of schools, and selling out our future to liberal special interests groups._ ****JOIN US -> SEND THE FAR-LEFT A MESSAGE**** Virginia's 2021 Governor's race is the FIRST opportunity for conservative patriots like YOU to send a message and strike a serious blow to Joe Biden's Administration. ****JOIN US -> SEND THE FAR-LEFT A MESSAGE**** Friend, I will not stand by as spineless politicians in Richmond and Washington **FAIL** small businesses and working families. ****JOIN US -> SEND THE FAR-LEFT A MESSAGE****
As an innovator and proven job-creator, I know first-hand that the left's agenda will only do more harm and destroy more businesses. If Ralph Northam, Terry McAuliffe, and Joe Biden are allowed to rule _**UNCHECKED**_ , our future will be lost to the radical left forever. I'm getting ready to take them all on, Friend. But this doesn't happen without your support. **The only way we defeat the radical left is together. Can I count on you to chip in $25, $15, even $5 to our campaign for Governor today?**

Thank you for all that you do,

Pete Snyder
---

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rF69t9pZdq6QZS5GIo2dxrl9xyGQgquJMiya1p-MyYbbZ1L2vfsusG0c1YuZXNJpijowdTK1Ldqbng0ECsWLkIBbSRUOhENAACA0HO9cd4tf8AdCm4LexKmBE2ps98ldFu8urAdl5jHEjdpoax8ehr-vGN8qNhOMACIXdWcQ_kMDc8WUlk1nAyyvdmYxx6OMeXVDtvY4baWPsMPJicHoAJ1DwtpwnduEwvX_SdWyew-rdRbChsfEpgdROOcEb1U2rJUqvQn-oiqI5sb-AweLTUyJ4QZ_Sz-PQJhjQl61YkBpLHBt3YKNl9VeVE4ayQQlwrfu7TlyYoH139ZJKr9DAz7-pIMoMikwb4iij5OK66vGzBO9JRu-BDXCE6cJ1-ce_GqJDdK0U2EcL5PVPIg6zBwxSZzOPsftd9_ZYrQWJ1YhxDWuqQFbY1IYJPat6YH0vDx14-FcJqnwLmqwRZtyIw==&c=cz9MekZoP4sCE5j6X208Abx7dMAkdfqA7w4ns9mObj-ail9EHWWchg==&ch=-mD9KQQtbJyth-_LJyDm1pqlOVtD7omgIihvP0xgn_1oboRre8laSQ==)
****
Friend,
**Democrats are moving BACKWARDS on election security** , working to strip states of their constitutional right to administer and secure their elections as they see fit, and to dismantle basic rules that prevent election fraud.
**[**PROTECT OUR ELECTIONS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rF69t9pZdq6QZS5GIo2dxrl9xyGQgquJMiya1p-MyYbbZ1L2vfsusG0c1YuZXNJpijowdTK1Ldqbng0ECsWLkIBbSRUOhENAACA0HO9cd4tf8AdCm4LexKmBE2ps98ldFu8urAdl5jHEjdpoax8ehr-vGN8qNhOMACIXdWcQ_kMDc8WUlk1nAyyvdmYxx6OMeXVDtvY4baWPsMPJicHoAJ1DwtpwnduEwvX_SdWyew-rdRbChsfEpgdROOcEb1U2rJUqvQn-oiqI5sb-AweLTUyJ4QZ_Sz-PQJhjQl61YkBpLHBt3YKNl9VeVE4ayQQlwrfu7TlyYoH139ZJKr9DAz7-pIMoMikwb4iij5OK66vGzBO9JRu-BDXCE6cJ1-ce_GqJDdK0U2EcL5PVPIg6zBwxSZzOPsftd9_ZYrQWJ1YhxDWuqQFbY1IYJPat6YH0vDx14-FcJqnwLmqwRZtyIw==&c=cz9MekZoP4sCE5j6X208Abx7dMAkdfqA7w4ns9mObj-ail9EHWWchg==&ch=-mD9KQQtbJyth-_LJyDm1pqlOVtD7omgIihvP0xgn_1oboRre8laSQ==)**
To combat this nonsense, the RSLC launched a committee dedicated to pushing common sense election security and reform. But we can't do it without YOUR grassroots support.
Friend, with your contribution of $15 or more you can help RSLC secure our elections AND claim your Official Election Defender card: [**Claim yours NOW!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rF69t9pZdq6QZS5GIo2dxrl9xyGQgquJMiya1p-MyYbbZ1L2vfsusG0c1YuZXNJpijowdTK1Ldqbng0ECsWLkIBbSRUOhENAACA0HO9cd4tf8AdCm4LexKmBE2ps98ldFu8urAdl5jHEjdpoax8ehr-vGN8qNhOMACIXdWcQ_kMDc8WUlk1nAyyvdmYxx6OMeXVDtvY4baWPsMPJicHoAJ1DwtpwnduEwvX_SdWyew-rdRbChsfEpgdROOcEb1U2rJUqvQn-oiqI5sb-AweLTUyJ4QZ_Sz-PQJhjQl61YkBpLHBt3YKNl9VeVE4ayQQlwrfu7TlyYoH139ZJKr9DAz7-pIMoMikwb4iij5OK66vGzBO9JRu-BDXCE6cJ1-ce_GqJDdK0U2EcL5PVPIg6zBwxSZzOPsftd9_ZYrQWJ1YhxDWuqQFbY1IYJPat6YH0vDx14-FcJqnwLmqwRZtyIw==&c=cz9MekZoP4sCE5j6X208Abx7dMAkdfqA7w4ns9mObj-ail9EHWWchg==&ch=-mD9KQQtbJyth-_LJyDm1pqlOVtD7omgIihvP0xgn_1oboRre8laSQ==)
**[**CLAIM MY CARD**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rF69t9pZdq6QZS5GIo2dxrl9xyGQgquJMiya1p-MyYbbZ1L2vfsusG0c1YuZXNJpijowdTK1Ldqbng0ECsWLkIBbSRUOhENAACA0HO9cd4tf8AdCm4LexKmBE2ps98ldFu8urAdl5jHEjdpoax8ehr-vGN8qNhOMACIXdWcQ_kMDc8WUlk1nAyyvdmYxx6OMeXVDtvY4baWPsMPJicHoAJ1DwtpwnduEwvX_SdWyew-rdRbChsfEpgdROOcEb1U2rJUqvQn-oiqI5sb-AweLTUyJ4QZ_Sz-PQJhjQl61YkBpLHBt3YKNl9VeVE4ayQQlwrfu7TlyYoH139ZJKr9DAz7-pIMoMikwb4iij5OK66vGzBO9JRu-BDXCE6cJ1-ce_GqJDdK0U2EcL5PVPIg6zBwxSZzOPsftd9_ZYrQWJ1YhxDWuqQFbY1IYJPat6YH0vDx14-FcJqnwLmqwRZtyIw==&c=cz9MekZoP4sCE5j6X208Abx7dMAkdfqA7w4ns9mObj-ail9EHWWchg==&ch=-mD9KQQtbJyth-_LJyDm1pqlOVtD7omgIihvP0xgn_1oboRre8laSQ==)**
Elections are the backbone of American democracy, which has inspired countless nations around the world to replicate our system -- but this all falls apart if people can't trust their vote will be counted. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. body:
It's a word that TERRIFIES Democrats.

**FREEDOM**

It's a word that TERRIFIES Democrats. The more freedom Americans have, the harder it is for Democrats to enact their socialist agenda.

Democrats and ultra-liberal companies continue to target and censor conservative voices. If it doesn't align with their agenda, they want it gone. Does that sound like a party who supports unity and freedom?

We must push back against this radical censorship, Friend. If we don't stop this now, who knows what freedoms they'll come for next. body:
%%First Name%%, As a conservative Republican Senator who happens to be a Black man, Tim Scott has A LOT of haters. But thankfully he has no better friend than Trey Gowdy. Trey went off on Fox News this week after MSNBC host Joy Reid said that Tim Scott was just a "token" to provide a "patina of diversity" to Republicans.
Friend,

As a conservative Republican Senator who happens to be a Black man, Tim Scott has _A LOT_ of haters. But thankfully he has no better friend than Trey Gowdy.

Trey went off on Fox News this week after MSNBC host Joy Reid said that Tim Scott was just a "token" to provide a "patina of diversity" to Republicans.
[WATCH THE VIDEO](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stand-with-tim-against-the-liberal-haters/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210310_TY.100609_team-scott_t1051018-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210310_watch-trey-gowdy-slams-tim-scott-hater)
---

[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stand-with-tim-against-the-liberal-haters/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210310_TY.100609_team-scott_t1051018-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210310_watch-trey-gowdy-slams-tim-scott-hater)

Trey has it right. The fact that Joy Reid thinks a hard-working and respected U.S. Senator is a racial token or prop says more about her than it does Tim.

[**Friend, we ask that you WATCH THE VIDEO and then SIGN OUR PETITION to show your support for Senator Tim Scott.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stand-with-tim-against-the-liberal-haters/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210310_TY.100609_team-scott_t1051018-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210310_watch-trey-gowdy-slams-tim-scott-hater)

We need to follow Trey's lead and STAND UP to haters like Joy Reid. Tim is looking out for us in the Senate. Let's help him by showing our support today.

[**Please watch the video AND sign the petition to support Tim.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stand-with-tim-against-the-liberal-haters/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210310_TY.100609_team-scott_t1051018-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210310_watch-trey-gowdy-slams-tim-scott-hater)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: The light at the end of the tunnel
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

It’s officially been a year since our lives were uprooted and we all started to stay home to protect our families, our friends, and our community.

The United States has recorded over 29.1 million cases and 525,000 deaths. We’ve suffered greatly throughout the pandemic and while Congress has taken steps to crush the virus and rebuild the economy, more help is needed. With President Biden’s COVID-19 relief package, many will receive the relief they so desperately need, including more access to vaccines.

Here are just a few ways the relief package will help: *
It
will
increase
funding
for
vaccine
distribution,
testing,
and
will
aid
in
hiring
more
public
health
workers
to
support
response
to
the
pandemic.
*
It
will
provide
funding
to
schools
so
they
can
provide
ventilation
systems,
buy
PPE,
reduce
class
sizes,
and
prevent
teacher
layoffs
in
the
coming
year.
*
It
will
increase
funding
for
State
and
Local
government
along
with
Native
Tribes.
This
will
help
aid
firefighters
as
we
head
into
wildfire
season
and
will
increase
funding
for
business
assistance.
*
State
and
local
governments
would
receive
housing
aid
to
cover
rent
assistance,
utility
assistance,
mortgage
payment
assistance,
homeless
services
and
support,
and
much
more.
*
It
will
extend
crucial
pandemic
unemployment
programs
through
the
end
of
August.
Currently,
these
programs
are
scheduled
to
end
in
less
than
a
month.

I can’t thank you all enough for doing your part. I know this year has been hard, but there’s a light at the end of the tunnel.

Please click here to find out more information about vaccine qualifications, where you can sign up to get the vaccine, and more! [https://covid19.ca.gov/vaccines/]

I know it feels as though this process is slow, but please know that my colleagues and I are working tirelessly to increase access to the vaccinations and help increase relief as quickly as possible.

We still have a lot of work to do, but the end of this dark tunnel is near.

Thank you for your willingness to keep yourself and our communities safe.

Mike Thompson

clean_body: [#] Peter, It’s officially been a year since our lives were uprooted and we all started to stay home to protect our families, our friends, and our community. The United States has recorded over 29.1 million cases and 525,000 deaths. We’ve suffered greatly throughout the pandemic and while Congress has taken steps to crush the virus and rebuild the economy, more help is needed. With President Biden’s COVID-19 relief package, many will receive the relief they so desperately need, including more access to vaccines. Here are just a few ways the relief package will help: It will increase funding for vaccine distribution, testing, and will aid in hiring more public health workers to support response to the pandemic. It will provide funding to schools so they can provide ventilation systems, buy PPE, reduce class sizes, and prevent teacher layoffs in the coming year. It will increase funding for State and Local government along with Native Tribes. This will help aid firefighters as we head into wildfire season and will increase funding for business assistance. State and local governments would receive housing aid to cover rent assistance, utility assistance, mortgage payment assistance, homeless services and support, and much more. * It will extend crucial pandemic unemployment programs through the end of August. Currently, these programs are scheduled to end in less than a month. I can’t thank you all enough for doing your part. I know this year has been hard, but there’s a light at the end of the tunnel. Please click here to find out more information about vaccine qualifications, where you can sign up to get the vaccine, and more! [] I know it feels as though this process is slow, but please know that my colleagues and I are working tirelessly to increase access to the vaccinations and help increase relief as quickly as possible. We still have a lot of work to do, but the end of this dark tunnel is near. Thank you for your willingness to keep yourself and our communities safe. Mike Thompson Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

body:
After one of the closest elections in U.S. History (a margin of just 6 votes), the Radical Left is trying to change the vote totals.

Friend,

**In Iowa's 2nd Congressional District, Nancy Pelosi is trying to blatantly disregard the will of Iowa voters, remove me from this seat, and replace me with a hand-picked Democrat who will vote along with her radical Leftist agenda.**

After one of the closest elections in U.S. History (a margin of just 6 votes), the Radical Left is trying to change the vote totals -- just because they didn't get the outcome they wanted. Nancy Pelosi is DESPERATE to keep her grip on her liberal majority in Congress. [**I need fellow conservatives, who stand for free and fair elections, to stand with me now against Pelosi 's ILLEGAL power grab!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LIv60usRcRPXy1iUkO88XCAFfgcwh9nZ6N3HsbkiLCTLstF3z_xXUFsYMM_m3U-XLS3VpQQDiR9edfMIu8SDwVvO1CIavIMmtKbQV-EKFXdxhMxF9XyuwOp1Rv7GwD0mrgxUj57_-_QW0EQS4M8Ogb3UT9-H2-YbS3L7noNmIjxuCQ0VCSvU43BC_BX82X7O76ISJ8mO-_sbfXhUREc5O4pOH1WryFzlkvLcABwkxTdksgYM91fsB13KLo5IFNolk26AHv9Bg8cktMYx-dGt3U2K-KdyOpa6eIdNrKFQO5yD6EMkoEhPt5HkGITp5_i-SEeGaxdPre5esMePjcZZhwyx_vAP6NvmGHph5pRgGTqEUg8laV8L4aw5BPy-JT02toJhNCji_IHex_cMVRLcjYE8fBRr2-Gf5B2d7Oav6y4g8g_ixV6apCUqX8liBCxyV0DYxFjbHYHPCm6fl68U5TaAiGNauQX4&c=jtVuI7OvLAb5q42Q6urVO-Eb0Haexl4eIU8ItQFImA2BuOtfVj1haQ==&ch=8kf4djrTsSJFOm_PHEPGGEkSsQOGWg0tdmfA3oKV5UzDouCrEUwe1A==)

For decades Nancy Pelosi has done her best to enact dangerous policies that hurt the American people. But now, as House Democrats have the smallest majority in history, she is trying to directly ignore the will of the people AND STEAL THIS ELECTION!

I need you to stand with me today and join the Election Defense Fund so we can put a STOP to her illegal power grab. Can I count on your support?

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: The last line of defense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
While working for President Trump in the White House, the radical left came after me for everything. And it wasn’t just our policies they had a... [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=cd0aa0d0fa4b45fdabc30b59df0d1880&_e=chtpIVRDBujBcQcQpslJNp3puk9u9SNRngO9fmkJXBn8_NYFLoOHBZQWpg0GnXqpIeJaQgp3tUqQSz89MMiTgLn-PD7r8Q2aFsZHwlN06xp938_wRiRzbnpsdsA-mAITBVMSbS6mbkpOLpa-oXkq684DyO9wCnYbGkQz0iTYsb5Vx-uehDrIaW_zCMywuM3rlT_Tpt4cavLa9J2K3RMRunYWeMc648ouDNgZhPUlRVEO5BaK1-yHWw54_UmfN4y1-teQvM_ADq9BbUKEDsgAj5Qa1XQjHanHOVmMoiYgRllALziXrIcKbkTjesa5UYiP_BHOiRW0E2fOZDiYvWq0OwcHmPBRIAdGOuDapbaCk3JWA2I9lUIWXsIpSrAm6vK-1Ij73z1KILVQppCG4cnpfDpZpeSQtGbrLL6Brtr4Im6bLiSJdvxZOkPcl60wLNPbjsQt2Ei9Q33vztwTnHlrNaKracPS2knOuoZO4Nnoy6A%3D) Peter, While working for President Trump in the White House, the radical left came after me for everything. And it wasn’t just our policies they had a problem with – they even came after me personally! I developed a thick skin under that constant pressure, Peter, and it taught me something important: some things are worth fighting for, no matter how tough the battle gets. And with the radical left in control of Washington, that’s true now more than ever. We need governors dedicated to fighting for our freedom. **I’m here to tell you, as Governor I’m ready to stand strong. ** I know I will be the last line of defense against their socialist agenda and I’m pledging to give it my all. Today, I’m hoping you’ll join me by taking my LAST LINE OF DEFENSE PLEDGE. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: After 18 Years, Billion-Dollar Bioterror Defense System Still Can’t Detect Multiple Threats
body:
In the latest of many issues to plague the nation’s seriously flawed system to detect biological attacks, a federal audit reveals it lacks detection equipment in more than half the country and is unable to recognize multiple biological agents that pose threats.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | March 10, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53108&L=22332&F=H&)
---
# [After 18 Years, Billion-Dollar Bioterror Defense System Still Can’t Detect Multiple Threats](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53108&L=22332&F=H&)
In the latest of many issues to plague the nation’s seriously flawed system to detect biological attacks, a federal audit reveals it lacks detection equipment in more than half the country and is unable to recognize multiple biological agents that pose threats. The beleaguered system, known as BioWatch, has already received north of a billion dollars in government funding and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) keeps pouring money into it despite its well-documented failures. Here is why; the government has no back up plan to deal with a biological terrorist attack, a very realistic threat considering the meteoric rise of the Islamic State of Iraq and Greater Syria (ISIS). That disturbing information was disclosed by a senior DHS official who confirmed after congressional investigators exposed BioWatch’s deficiencies that it is the only “biosurveillance system designed to detect the intentional release of select aerosolized biological agents.”
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53108&L=22332&F=H&)
|

clean_body: In the latest of many issues to plague the nation’s seriously flawed system to detect biological attacks, a federal audit reveals it lacks detection equipment in more than half the country and is unable to recognize multiple biological agents that pose threats. | | | Because no one is above the law! | March 10, 2021 ---|---|--- | | In the latest of many issues to plague the nation’s seriously flawed system to detect biological attacks, a federal audit reveals it lacks detection equipment in more than half the country and is unable to recognize multiple biological agents that pose threats. The beleaguered system, known as BioWatch, has already received north of a billion dollars in government funding and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) keeps pouring money into it despite its well-documented failures. Here is why; the government has no back up plan to deal with a biological terrorist attack, a very realistic threat considering the meteoric rise of the Islamic State of Iraq and Greater Syria (ISIS). That disturbing information was disclosed by a senior DHS official who confirmed after congressional investigators exposed BioWatch’s deficiencies that it is the only “biosurveillance system designed to detect the intentional release of select aerosolized biological agents.” | | | Judicial Watch “The public has the right to know about CDC’s involvement in Big Tech’s outrageous censorship of Americans, including doctors, who raise questions about the COVID-19 response,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Biden administration should stop stonewalling and release the records about the CDC’s role in suppressing the free speech of Americans.” Judicial Watch Pelosi acknowledged the call in a January 8 letter to her Democratic colleagues. In the letter, Pelosi purportedly related her discussion with Milley earlier that same day: “This morning, I spoke to the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Mark Milley to discuss available precautions for preventing an unstable president from initiating military hostilities or accessing the launch codes and ordering a nuclear strike. The situation of this unhinged President could not be more dangerous, and we must do everything that we can to protect the American people from his unbalanced assault on our country and our democracy.” == The Daily Caller One such overdue reckoning is coming for New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who seemingly caused thousands of needless deaths by shipping infected elderly people to nursing homes, placing the most dangerous among the most vulnerable. His administration then covered up the number of deaths it caused, recently justifying the move on the grounds that the truth would have been politically inconvenient. The governor who received an Emmy award for his “masterful” televised coronavirus briefings is now facing an FBI investigation and calls to resign. == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |
